A NÍTIDA Digital brand

Not more marketing. Better marketing.

Websites, landing pages and follow-up systems for businesses tired of empty promises.

Get in touch See services

What we do

Three areas of practical execution. No filler.

Landing Pages and Conversion Websites

Your website exists. But it doesn't convert.

Pages that explain your offer, capture contacts and push visitors toward action.

Learn more

Local Visibility and Practical Improvements

You don't show up where your customers are looking.

Optimised Google Business, real local presence and fixes that have immediate impact.

Learn more

CRM and Follow-up

Leads come in and disappear.

Clear pipeline, automated follow-up and less reliance on memory and goodwill.

Learn more

AI with human supervision. Not the other way around.

We use AI to research, draft and systematize faster. But judgement, editing and the decisions that matter always stay on the human side. You never get dumped into a black box.

The process

01

Diagnosis

We understand what's failing before proposing anything. No 40-page reports to justify the work.

02

Clear offer

We define what will be done, how, and with what expected outcome. No vague promises.

03

Execution

We deliver the work. No weeks lost in meetings about meetings.

04

Review and adjust

We measure what matters. If something isn't working, we adjust — we don't invent excuses.

We didn't invent marketing yesterday

MAU Marketing is a brand of NÍTIDA Digital, with years of real digital delivery: websites, systems, integrations and client work. We know the difference between marketing theory and execution that actually works.

Meet NÍTIDA Digital

Is your website costing you customers?

Let's figure out what's leaking leads and fix it.
